name: directory layout: all 14 default source-namespace folders exist (google, us-government, european-union, finance-industry, owasp, w3c, web-vitals, react, node, typescript, slsa, linux-foundation, industry-self-regulatory, _universal)
command: for ns in google us-government european-union finance-industry owasp w3c web-vitals react node typescript slsa linux-foundation industry-self-regulatory _universal; do test -d "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/$ns" || { echo "FAIL missing $ns" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
